creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


This is a local problem, not a problem with the port. 

Assuming that your "how to repeat" section describes what you 
actually did, that could be part of the problem. You want to 
do the following: 

cd /usr/ports/dns/bind94 
make clean 
make rmconfig 
make 

Then install as you usually would. If that doesn't work for 
you, please follow up on freebsd-ports@freebsd.org. 

Good luck, 

Doug
